Our Story

About Lavisha

Home / About Us
Family Owned, Founded On Trust

Timeless Beauty, Thoughtfully Made

Lavisha began as a small family dream — three women, Lalitha, Vasuki and Aishu, who believed that beautiful jewellery shouldn't come with the worry of tarnish, allergies, or a price tag that puts it out of reach.

What started as a handful of pieces shared with friends and family has grown into a curated house of anti-tarnish and stainless steel jewellery, worn daily by women who want quality they can trust and shine that stays.

Every piece we sell is chosen personally, checked for finish and durability, and packaged the way we'd want to receive a gift ourselves. That care is the thread that runs through everything Lavisha makes.

FAQ

Common Questions

Yes — every piece is finished with a protective anti-tarnish coating designed to resist discolouration from daily wear, sweat, and humidity, keeping the shine intact for much longer than untreated jewellery.

Orders are typically dispatched within 24–48 hours and delivered within 4–7 business days depending on your location. Free delivery applies on orders above ₹2000.

Yes, Cash on Delivery is available on orders above ₹3000. You can also pay via UPI, debit, or credit card at checkout.

Absolutely — unused items in original packaging can be returned or exchanged within 7 days of delivery. Reach out to us via the contact form above to start the process.
